form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track well beaten by Pedal On Metal (1:55.40) in NW10000L5 on April 3 at $21.51. Two runs back won by 3 m (Fr4) at this track (1:58.20) beating Marin County in W2BNMT4 on March 25 at $3.65. Needs to do more. Others better.
